message:
Implement P3.2a: Service Worker with COOP/COEP headers

- Add sw.js service worker with security headers
  - Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin
  - Cross-Origin-Embedder-Policy: require-corp
  - Content-Security-Policy headers
  - Enables SharedArrayBuffer for sqlite-wasm

- Add sw-register.js for service worker management
  - Registration and activation handling
  - Update detection and notification
  - SharedArrayBuffer availability check
  - Cache management utilities

- Add offline caching for static assets
  - Cache-first strategy for performance
  - Network fallback with caching
  - Offline navigation support

- Update index.html to register service worker

Part of Phase 3: Web Viewer (coding_agent_session_search-uok7)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
